name: Cards
description: Card-game vocabulary. A Card has one or more Prints (physical or digital instances of the same card). Each Print IS-A Positionable (from bundle-spatial), so the relationship between a Print and its Position is expressed by the Positionable HAS Position chain — no separate OF (Position → Print) needed. A Position additionally lives IN a Zone (hand, deck, table, exile, …) AT an Index (which slot). Common triple shapes: Print OF Card · Print HAS Position · Position IN Zone · Position AT Index · Index OF Zone. Depends on bundle-spatial (for Position, Location, Positionable) — which itself pulls in bundle-attributes and bundle-temporal.
